title: BEM-845 fix OIDC permission
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created=str(now)
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
changed=False
if wf.exists():
    if 'permissions:' in text:
        lines=text.splitlines()
        out=[]
        in_perm=False
        inserted=False
        for line in lines:
            out.append(line)
            if line.startswith('permissions:'):
                in_perm=True
                continue
            if in_perm:
                if line and not line.startswith(' ') and not line.startswith('\t'):
                    if not any('id-token:' in x for x in out):
                        out.insert(len(out)-1,'  id-token: write')
                        inserted=True
                    in_perm=False
        if in_perm and not any('id-token:' in x for x in out):
            out.append('  id-token: write')
            inserted=True
        new='\n'.join(out)+sep
        if inserted:
            text=new
            changed=True
    else:
        # Insert permissions after on block is hard; safe prepend after name line if present.
        lines=text.splitlines()
        if lines and lines[0].startswith('name:'):
            text=lines[0]+sep+sep+'permissions:'+sep+'  contents: write'+sep+'  issues: write'+sep+'  id-token: write'+sep+sep+'\n'.join(lines[1:])+sep
        else:
            text='permissions:'+sep+'  contents: write'+sep+'  issues: write'+sep+'  id-token: write'+sep+sep+text
        changed=True
    wf.write_text(text)
status='oidc_permission_present' if wf.exists() and 'id-token: write' in text else 'workflow_missing_or_permission_not_added'
blocker=None if status=='oidc_permission_present' else {'workflow_exists':wf.exists(),'path':str(wf)}
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'workflow':str(wf),'changed':changed,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_fix_claude_dispatcher_oidc_permission.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_fix_claude_dispatcher_oidc_permission.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Fix Claude Dispatcher OIDC Permission | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: dispatch Claude Internal Auditor Dispatcher again and verify outcome no longer reports OIDC token permission failure. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: dispatch dispatcher and verify OIDC error fixed.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(wf),'governance/state/bem845_fix_claude_dispatcher_oidc_permission.json','governance/reports/bem845_fix_claude_dispatcher_oidc_permission.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Added id-token: write permission to Claude Internal Auditor Dispatcher workflow to fix OIDC token fetch failure shown in GitHub Actions annotations')
"""
No issue comments.
